overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path at night toward a wooden windmill. The scene features cool blue nighttime lighting, dense vegetation, and eventually reveals a camp with a campfire as the character passes the windmill.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail through forested countryside

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward the distant windmill visible ahead

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail with visible rocks and wheel ruts
tall wooden windmill with four blades silhouetted against the night sky
dense deciduous trees lining the left side of the path
tall grass and bushes alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a forested area at night. The path is flanked by dense vegetation and trees, with a wooden windmill visible in the distance ahead. The cool blue lighting creates a moody atmosphere as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: path curves slightly to the right as the windmill grows larger on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the windmill looms larger and shifts to the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the windmill, the path opens slightly and curves to the right. The windmill dominates the left side of the frame now, growing from a distant silhouette to a detailed wooden structure. The left side forest recedes as the terrain opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with windmill and camp site

events.description: passing the windmill reveals a camp with burning campfire on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the windmill base alongside a camp with a burning fire and wooden structures

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames illuminating nearby wooden structures
wooden wagon or cart near the camp fire
open grassy field extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the windmill and enters a more open area where a camp with a burning fire becomes visible on the left. The warm firelight contrasts with the cool moonlight as the character continues along the path past wooden structures and carts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nocturnal forest trail that transitions from a secluded wooded path into an open campsite. It begins with Geralt walking through dense vegetation under cool blue lighting, with a distant wooden windmill serving as a focal point ahead. As the character moves forward, the path curves to the right and the forest recedes, allowing the windmill to grow from a silhouette into a detailed structure that dominates the left side of the frame. The scene then opens further as Geralt passes the windmill, shifting the atmosphere from moody moonlight to the warm glow of a burning campfire. Finally, the camera follows him past wooden structures and carts as he enters the illuminated camp area.
